title: Checkrd Telemetry Event
description: Schema for telemetry events sent from proxy wrappers to the control plane. Designed for compatibility with the OpenTelemetry Span model.

matched_rule.description: Name of the policy rule that determined the decision. Null for default-action fallthrough.

matched_rule_kind.description: Category of the matched rule. Used for dashboard filtering and compliance audit.

policy_mode.description: Policy enforcement mode at evaluation time. dry_run decisions are logged but not enforced.

evaluation_path.description: Ordered trace of evaluation stages. Each entry records what the engine checked and the result.

stage.description: Evaluation stage: kill_switch, rate_limit, deny_rules, allow_rules, default

rule.description: Name of the rule checked at this stage

result.description: Outcome: pass, exceeded, matched, no_match, skipped, active

detail.description: Additional context (e.g., rate limit scope, dry_run reason)

trace_id.description: OTEL trace ID -- 32 lowercase hex chars (128-bit, W3C Trace Context)

span_id.description: OTEL span ID -- 16 lowercase hex chars (64-bit)

parent_span_id.description: OTEL parent span ID -- propagated from W3C traceparent header

span_name.description: OTEL span name -- low-cardinality operation identifier, e.g. 'GET api.stripe.com'. Maps to Datadog resource name, Grafana Tempo span name.

span_kind.description: OTEL span kind. Always 'INTERNAL' for Checkrd policy evaluation spans.

span_status_code.description: OTEL span status. OK for 2xx-3xx responses, ERROR for 5xx, UNSET for denied/4xx.

span_status_message.description: OTEL span status description. Set for ERROR (upstream details) and denied requests (policy reason).
